name: 3-Day Tour: Fes → Chefchaouen → Tangier

seo.title: 3-Day Fes → Chefchaouen → Tangier Tour | Authentic Morocco Tours
seo.description: Private 3-day tour from Fes to Tangier via Chefchaouen: guided visit of the Fes medina, the Blue City of Chefchaouen, crossing the Rif, arrival in Tangier.

hero.tagline: Fes → Chefchaouen → Tangier: the great Moroccan north

intro: This 3-day tour connects Fes to Tangier with a stop in Chefchaouen. Guided tour of the Fes medina on day one, then discovery of the Blue City, and finally a crossing of the Rif mountains to reach Tangier, the gateway to Europe. Perfect for those departing by ferry from Tangier.
